fetchSource: Seed articles — replaced by GitHub Actions RSS fetch at 7AM + 4PM IST

articles.title: Why term insurance is the most important financial product you can buy
articles.summary: Financial planners unanimously recommend term insurance as the foundation of any financial plan. Here is why pure protection beats investment-cum-insurance products.

articles.title: How to choose the right sum assured for your term insurance plan
articles.summary: Choosing the right sum assured is critical for adequate family protection. Experts recommend the Human Life Value method over the simple income-multiple rule.

articles.title: Claim settlement ratio 2024-25: Which life insurer settled most claims?
articles.summary: IRDAI's annual report reveals claim settlement ratios for all life insurers in FY 2024-25. Private insurers show significant improvement with several crossing 99 percent.

articles.title: Health insurance portability: Everything you need to know before switching
articles.summary: Switching health insurance while retaining your accumulated waiting period credits is now easier. Here is the step-by-step guide to health insurance portability in India.

articles.title: LIC new tech term plan vs private insurers: A complete comparison
articles.summary: LIC's online term plan competes with private insurers on premium, features and claim record. We compare LIC New Tech-Term with HDFC Click 2 Protect and ABSLI Super Term.

articles.title: IRDAI's Bima Sugam platform: One place for all your insurance needs
articles.summary: IRDAI's unified insurance marketplace Bima Sugam aims to simplify buying, servicing and settling insurance claims through a single digital platform for all Indians.

articles.title: IRDAI master circular on linked and non-linked insurance products 2024
articles.summary: IRDAI issued a comprehensive master circular consolidating all regulations for linked (ULIP) and non-linked insurance products, effective from April 2024.

articles.title: IRDAI increases free look period to 30 days for all insurance policies
articles.summary: The insurance regulator extended the free look period from 15 to 30 days for all insurance products, giving policyholders more time to review and return new policies.

articles.title: SIP vs lump sum: Which investment strategy works better in 2025?
articles.summary: Systematic Investment Plans offer rupee cost averaging, while lump sum investments can outperform during market dips. Here is a data-driven comparison for Indian investors.

articles.title: Best ELSS mutual funds 2025: Tax saving with equity growth potential
articles.summary: ELSS funds offer tax deduction under Section 80C with the lowest lock-in period of 3 years among all 80C instruments. Here are the top performers of 2025.

articles.title: Section 80C deductions: Complete guide to life insurance tax benefits
articles.summary: Life insurance premiums qualify for deduction under Section 80C up to Rs 1.5 lakh per year. This guide covers eligibility, limits, conditions and examples.

articles.title: Section 80D: Claim health insurance premium deduction up to Rs 1 lakh
articles.summary: Section 80D allows deduction of health insurance premiums paid for self, spouse, children and parents. The limit is Rs 25,000 (Rs 50,000 for senior citizens).

articles.title: GST on insurance: What rate applies on your term, health and ULIP premiums?
articles.summary: Insurance premiums attract 18 percent GST. This article explains GST applicability on term insurance, health insurance, ULIPs and group insurance premiums in India.

articles.title: RBI repo rate decision: Impact on your home loan EMI and insurance returns
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's repo rate decision directly affects home loan EMIs and insurance company investment portfolios, which in turn impacts participating policy bonuses.

articles.title: FD rates vs insurance endowment plans: Where should you park your savings?
articles.summary: Bank FD rates have risen to 7-8 percent while insurance endowment plans still offer 4-5 percent returns. We compare risk, liquidity and tax efficiency of both options.

articles.title: How to calculate how much term insurance you actually need
articles.summary: Most Indians are severely under-insured. Learn the Human Life Value method to calculate the exact amount of term insurance cover your family needs if you were not there.

articles.title: Emergency fund and insurance: Why you need both and how to build them
articles.summary: An emergency fund covers short-term shocks while insurance handles catastrophic events. Here is how to build both simultaneously without stretching your monthly budget.

articles.title: NPS vs life insurance for retirement: Which should you choose?
articles.summary: National Pension System and life insurance annuities both create retirement income. NPS offers flexibility, insurance offers guaranteed payout. We compare both options.

articles.title: How Sensex and Nifty rally impacts your ULIP fund value in 2025
articles.summary: The equity market rally has boosted ULIP fund values significantly. Policyholders invested in equity-oriented ULIP funds should review their asset allocation now.

articles.title: Insurance sector stocks: How listed insurers are performing on the bourses
articles.summary: Shares of listed insurance companies including HDFC Life, SBI Life, ICICI Prudential Life and New India Assurance have shown mixed performance in 2025.
